summary: Decent backyard audience recording with heavy crowd noise but a standout Samson & Delilah performance
review: The tape captures the show from a suburban backyard, so crowd ambience is very prominent and the sound isn’t pristine, yet listeners still get an enjoyable experience. Samson & Delilah is highlighted as a fun, high‑energy moment that makes the set worth hearing despite the noisy recording.

ai_rating.rationale: Only one review (4 ★) which praises the performance but notes crowd‑noise issues; rating reflects a good show with a fair‑quality audience recording.

recording_quality.technical_notes: Captured from a backyard about 6 mi away; heavy crowd noise dominates and the mix is distant/muffled, but the music remains audible.

show_quality.setlist_flow: No specific comments on pacing or transitions were provided.
